title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thus, my three-year schedule is now complete.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I have awoken right on schedule. Next is...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon, you are sliding off your futon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...An eighteen-second delay. I should factor this
into my schedule soon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I must prepare with haste. For today is—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Of course. That is my aesthetic.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's important to maintain one's schedule under
any circumstances so that they may produce
perfect results.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And I am in pursuit of that ideal.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A five-second delay has occurred. Trainer, let's
get our session underway at once.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I look forward to working with you today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am currently creating a schedule for the future.
As for when we will reach the end of my plan...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's just forge ahead together with that as an
unknown, Trainer.
